transcript.text: Okay, so yes, I'm in Trujillo, which is a small town, but it was bustling, and it had a nice central square, and yeah, I heard it was really good surfing too, like maybe 70 miles north of it was like the one of the longest surf breaks in the world was like really long, but I didn't do any surfing.

He was very intricately ornamented, this big golden round thing on his head. It was like the sun king and gold and everything, and there were these two dogs in the little place where I had to buy my ticket that didn't have any hair on them, and I walked through, and it was like this big maze.

And the walls were around the whole thing. We're still standing like 30 feet high, and it just, I mean, in its heyday, it would have been just huge. Amazing.
